name: Crazy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
FOR CAKE: In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, and salt. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. In another bowl, blend together melted butter, baking soda, and hot instant coffee. Pour these into the dry mixture and stir until combined. Stir in vanilla extract, eggs, and 1/2 teaspoon baking powder. Do not overmix; the batter should be lumpy. Divide the batter evenly between two greased, 9-inch round cake pans. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs attached.
FOR FROSTING: In a large bowl, combine heavy cream, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed until thick and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition. Refrigerate frosting for 1 to 2 hours before using. To serve, frost the cooled cake layers and refrigerate until ready to serve.
